## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Bryce Colburn for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves editorial oversight, project management, and product improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Bryce has extensive experience in SEO, content strategy, and editorial management](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Strong emphasis on meticulous planning and adaptability in content operations](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [AI integration is a point of interest, with Bryce being pro-AI despite current workplace limitations](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Technical Managing Editor works within delivery pods](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Responsibilities include:](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Editorial oversight and final approval of content](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [Managing day-to-day deliverables and meeting contractual obligations](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Collaborating with engineering team to improve content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [Working with account strategists on long-term client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Managing 3-5 accounts, focusing on blog content (no social media or video)](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Content generated through internal platform called Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Extensive experience in SEO, content strategy, and editorial management](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Key roles:](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [SEO firm: Managed 15+ accounts, created documentation and training materials](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [US News and World Report: Built out 360 reviews, became Content Operations Manager](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [USA Today Blueprint: Launched small business vertical, generated 70% of total revenue](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Forbes: Rebuilt small business vertical, now generating over 50% of total revenue](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Strong focus on systems development, documentation, and process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Experience in affiliate marketing and SEO-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Content Planning and Management

  - [Advocates for meticulous, detailed content planning](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Plans content 3 months in advance, including:](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [Specific content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Assignment of tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Due dates for writing, editing, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Utilizes tools like Airtable or Kanban boards for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Conducts regular check-ins (e.g., Monday meetings) to ensure team alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### Adaptability in Content Strategy

  - [Example: Forbes manual action by Google in November](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Quick response: Met with VP of Content within an hour](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Led major overhaul of content templates](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Focused on 100 most important pages](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Successfully resubmitted to Google, resulting in reinstatement](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### AI Integration in Content Creation

  - [Pro-AI advocate, member of AI board at Forbes](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Encourages AI use within his team for reviewing tools like Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Consults for AI to SMB Center of Excellence](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Educates executives on AI workflows and prompt writing](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Faces resistance to AI adoption at Forbes](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### GrowthX Insights

  - [Positive: Interesting business model, not SaaS-based](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Challenge: Rapid growth leading to scrambling and occasional messiness](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Evaluate Bryce's fit for the Technical Managing Editor role](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Consider Bryce's strong planning and adaptability skills in relation to GrowthX's rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Assess potential for leveraging Bryce's AI advocacy to enhance GrowthX's content operations](https://fathom.video/share/Eez8RTEenffvb2ikxuqu6enpfbQ1D6GH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
